query: INSERT INTO categories (establishmentId, name, description, sortOrder, isActive) VALUES (210005, 'Drinks', 'Coquetéis e drinks especiais', 13, 1); SET @cat_drinks = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, sortOrder) VALUES (210005, @cat_drinks, 'Drinks', 'Escolha seu drink', '0.00', 'active', 1); SET @prod_drinks = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementGroups (productId, name, minQuantity, maxQuantity, isRequired, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@prod_drinks, 'Escolha seu drink', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1); SET @grp_drinks = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementItems (groupId, name, price, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@grp_drinks, 'Aperol Spritz', '24.90', 1, 1), (@grp_drinks, 'Gin Tônica', '19.90', 1, 2), (@grp_drinks, 'Jack and Coke', '24.90', 1, 3), (@grp_drinks, 'Mojito', '21.90', 1, 4), (@grp_drinks, 'Piña Colada', '24.90', 1, 5), (@grp_drinks, 'Sex on the Beach', '25.90', 1, 6), (@grp_drinks, 'Caipirinha (limão / morango / abacaxi)', '24.90', 1, 7);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute INSERT INTO categories (establishmentId, name, description, sortOrder, isActive) VALUES (210005, 'Drinks', 'Coquetéis e drinks especiais', 13, 1); SET @cat_drinks = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, sortOrder) VALUES (210005, @cat_drinks, 'Drinks', 'Escolha seu drink', '0.00', 'active', 1); SET @prod_drinks = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementGroups (productId, name, minQuantity, maxQuantity, isRequired, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@prod_drinks, 'Escolha seu drink', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1); SET @grp_drinks = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementItems (groupId, name, price, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@grp_drinks, 'Aperol Spritz', '24.90', 1, 1), (@grp_drinks, 'Gin Tônica', '19.90', 1, 2), (@grp_drinks, 'Jack and Coke', '24.90', 1, 3), (@grp_drinks, 'Mojito', '21.90', 1, 4), (@grp_drinks, 'Piña Colada', '24.90', 1, 5), (@grp_drinks, 'Sex on the Beach', '25.90', 1, 6), (@grp_drinks, 'Caipirinha (limão / morango / abacaxi)', '24.90', 1, 7);
